description: MESSAI pipeline statistics — snapshot from production database

extraction.publishedExtractionsNote: All confidence > 0 with numeric values; labeled with ontology_matched, likely_garbage, verified_mes_paper flags
extraction.paperParameterMappingsNote: Ontology-mapped values (numeric + text), [object Object] and name-echo artifacts removed

methodology.pdfProcessing: Nougat (Meta) for OCR, regex + LLM for structured extraction
methodology.dataFiltering: Published CSVs exclude confidence=0, null numeric values, non-ontology parameter names, and [object Object] artifacts
